  : DPathSquare P sq_id 1 1 1 1 (a00:=a00) (b00:=b00).

contents: (** Different ways of constructing dependent squares *)

Context {A} {a0 a1 : A} {p : a0 = a1} {P : A -> Type}
    {b0 b1} (dp : DPath P p b0 b1).
Definition ds_refl_h : DPathSquare P (sq_refl_h _) dp dp 1 1.

goals.conclusion: DPathSquare P (sq_refl_h p) dp dp 1 1
DPathSquare P (sq_refl_h p) dp dp 1 1
DPathSquare P (sq_refl_h 1) dp dp 1 1

DPath (fun p : a00 = a11 => DPath P p b00 b11) s (qx0 @Dp q1x) (q0x @Dp qx1) <~>
DPathSquare P (sq_path s) qx0 qx1 q0x q1x

DPathSquare P (sq_path s) qx0 qx1 q0x q1x

DPathSquare P s' qx0 qx1 q0x q1x

contents: rewrite <- (eissect sq_path s : sq_path^-1 s' = s).

DPathSquare P s' qx0 qx1 q0x q1x
qx0 @ q1x = q0x @ qx1 <~> PathSquare qx0 qx1 q0x q1x

contents: (* A [DPathSquare] over a constant family is given by just a square *)

goals.conclusion:
PathSquare qx0 qx1 q0x q1x <~>
DPathSquare (fun _ : A => P) s (dp_const qx0) (dp_const qx1) 
  (dp_const q0x) (dp_const q1x)

DPathSquare (fun _ : A => P) s (dp_const qx0) (dp_const qx1) 
  (dp_const q0x) (dp_const q1x)

contents:
(* Sometimes we want the DPathSquare to be typed differently *)
(* This could be achieved with some clever rewriting of squares and DPathSquares *)
(* It seems that writing it like this might get in the way, Cube.v has
   some examples of this. *)

goals.conclusion:
PathSquare (dp_const^-1 qx0) (dp_const^-1 qx1) (dp_const^-1 q0x)
  (dp_const^-1 q1x) <~>
DPathSquare (fun _ : A => P) s qx0 qx1 q0x q1x

DPath (fun _ : A => P) px1 b01 b11
DPath (fun _ : A => P) p0x b00 b01
DPath (fun _ : A => P) p1x b10 b11

DPathSquare P (sq_refl_h 1) (apD f 1) (apD g 1) (q x) (q x)

DPathSquare P (sq_G1 p) qx0 qx1 1 1

contents: (** A [DPath] in a path-type is naturally a [DPathSquare].  *)

Definition equiv_ds_dp {A : Type} {B : A -> Type} (f g : forall a : A, B a)
  {x1 x2 : A} (p : x1 = x2) (q1 : f x1 = g x1) (q2 : f x2 = g x2)
  : DPath (fun x : A => f x = g x) p q1 q2
    <~> DPathSquare B (sq_refl_h p) (apD f p) (apD g p) q1 q2.

goals.conclusion:
DPath (fun x : A => f x = g x) p q1 q2 <~>
DPathSquare B (sq_refl_h p) (apD f p) (apD g p) q1 q2

DPath (fun x : A => f x = g x) p q1 q2 <~>
DPathSquare B (sq_refl_h p) (apD f p) (apD g p) q1 q2

DPath (fun x : A => f x = g x) 1 q1 q2 <~>
DPathSquare B (sq_refl_h 1) (apD f 1) (apD g 1) q1 q2

Definition ds_fill_l (qx1 : DPath P px1 b01 b11)
             (q0x : DPath P p0x b00 b01) (q1x : DPath P p1x b10 b11)
    : {qx0 : DPath P px0 b00 b10 & DPathSquare P s qx0 qx1 q0x q1x}.

goals.conclusion: {qx0 : DPath P px0 b00 b10 & DPathSquare P s qx0 qx1 q0x q1x}
{qx0 : DPath P px0 b00 b10 & DPathSquare P s qx0 qx1 q0x q1x}
qx0 = qx0'

hypotheses.type: DPathSquare P s qx0 qx1 q0x q1x
DPathSquare P s qx0' qx1 q0x q1x

goals.conclusion: qx0 = qx0'

hypotheses.type: DPathSquare P s qx0 qx1 q0x q1x
DPathSquare P s qx0' qx1 q0x q1x

goals.conclusion: qx0 = qx0'

hypotheses.type: DPathSquare P 1%square qx0 qx1 q0x q1x
DPathSquare P 1%square qx0' qx1 q0x q1x

Definition ds_fill_r (qx0 : DPath P px0 b00 b10)
             (q0x : DPath P p0x b00 b01) (q1x : DPath P p1x b10 b11)
    : {qx1 : DPath P px1 b01 b11 & DPathSquare P s qx0 qx1 q0x q1x}.

goals.conclusion: {qx1 : DPath P px1 b01 b11 & DPathSquare P s qx0 qx1 q0x q1x}
{qx1 : DPath P px1 b01 b11 & DPathSquare P s qx0 qx1 q0x q1x}
qx1 = qx1'

hypotheses.type: DPathSquare P s qx0 qx1 q0x q1x
DPathSquare P s qx0 qx1' q0x q1x

goals.conclusion: qx1 = qx1'

hypotheses.type: DPathSquare P s qx0 qx1 q0x q1x
DPathSquare P s qx0 qx1' q0x q1x

goals.conclusion: qx1 = qx1'

hypotheses.type: DPathSquare P 1%square qx0 qx1 q0x q1x
DPathSquare P 1%square qx0 qx1' q0x q1x

goals.conclusion: DPath P px0 b00 b10 <~> DPath P px1 b01 b11
DPath P px0 b00 b10 <~> DPath P px1 b01 b11
DPath P px0 b00 b10 -> DPath P px1 b01 b11
DPath P px1 b01 b11 -> DPath P px0 b00 b10
?f o ?g == idmap
?g o ?f == idmap
DPath P px0 b00 b10 -> DPath P px1 b01 b11

contents: intros qx0; exact (ds_fill_r qx0 q0x q1x).1.

goals.conclusion: DPath P px1 b01 b11 -> DPath P px0 b00 b10

contents: intros qx1; exact (ds_fill_l qx1 q0x q1x).1.

goals.conclusion:
(fun qx0 : DPath P px0 b00 b10 => (ds_fill_r qx0 q0x q1x).1)
o (fun qx1 : DPath P px1 b01 b11 => (ds_fill_l qx1 q0x q1x).1) == idmap
(ds_fill_r (ds_fill_l qx1 q0x q1x).1 q0x q1x).1 = qx1

contents:
exact (ds_fill_r_uniq (ds_fill_r _ q0x q1x).2
                            (ds_fill_l qx1 q0x q1x).2).

goals.conclusion:
(fun qx1 : DPath P px1 b01 b11 => (ds_fill_l qx1 q0x q1x).1)
o (fun qx0 : DPath P px0 b00 b10 => (ds_fill_r qx0 q0x q1x).1) == idmap
(ds_fill_l (ds_fill_r qx0 q0x q1x).1 q0x q1x).1 = qx0

contents:
exact (ds_fill_l_uniq (ds_fill_l _ q0x q1x).2
                            (ds_fill_r qx0 q0x q1x).2).

             (qx1 : DPath P px1 b01 b11) (q1x : DPath P p1x b10 b11)
    : {q0x : DPath P p0x b00 b01 & DPathSquare P s qx0 qx1 q0x q1x}.

             (qx1 : DPath P px1 b01 b11) (q0x : DPath P p0x b00 b01)
    : {q1x : DPath P p1x b10 b11 & DPathSquare P s qx0 qx1 q0x q1x}.

{q1x : DPath P p1x b10 b11 & DPathSquare P s qx0 qx1 q0x q1x}

contents: (** Another equivalent formulation of a dependent square over reflexivity *)

Definition equiv_ds_transport_dpath {A} {a0 a1 : A} {p : a0 = a1}
           {P : A -> Type} {b00 b10 b01 b11}
           (qx0 : DPath P p b00 b10) (qx1 : DPath P p b01 b11)
           (q0x : b00 = b01) (q1x : b10 = b11)
  : DPathSquare P (sq_refl_h p) qx0 qx1 q0x q1x
    <~> transport (fun y => DPath P p y b11) q0x
          (transport (fun y => DPath P p b00 y) q1x
                     qx0) = qx1.

goals.conclusion:
DPathSquare P (sq_refl_h p) qx0 qx1 q0x q1x <~>
transport (fun y : P a0 => DPath P p y b11) q0x
  (transport (fun y : P a1 => DPath P p b00 y) q1x qx0) =
qx1

DPathSquare P (sq_refl_h p) qx0 qx1 q0x q1x <~>
transport (fun y : P a0 => DPath P p y b11) q0x
  (transport (fun y : P a1 => DPath P p b00 y) q1x qx0) =
qx1

PathSquare qx0 qx1 q0x q1x <~>
transport (fun y : P a0 => y = b11) q0x
  (transport (fun y : P a0 => b00 = y) q1x qx0) =
qx1

qx0 @ q1x = q0x @ qx1 <~>
transport (fun y : P a0 => y = b11) q0x
  (transport (fun y : P a0 => b00 = y) q1x qx0) =
qx1

transport (fun y : P a0 => y = b11) q0x
  (transport (fun y : P a0 => b00 = y) q1x qx0) =
?Goal
qx0 @ q1x = q0x @ qx1 <~> ?Goal = qx1

transport (fun y : P a0 => y = b11) q0x
  (transport (fun y : P a0 => b00 = y) q1x qx0) =
?Goal

qx0 @ q1x = q0x @ qx1 <~>
q0x^ @ transport (fun y : P a0 => b00 = y) q1x qx0 = qx1

qx0 @ q1x = q0x @ qx1 <~>
transport (fun y : P a0 => b00 = y) q1x qx0 = q0x @ qx1
transport (fun y : P a0 => b00 = y) q1x qx0 = qx0 @ q1x
